referenceRule: Use the attached approved-family source only to preserve its Better Together identity territory, warm palette, optical weight, and human-cut edge character. Create materially different geometry. Do not trace, duplicate, or merely recolor the attached mark.
globalIconPrompt:
## Better Together identity variations - Round 4.1 app icon
- Deliverable: ONE finished square app-icon source, straight-on, centered, and filling the square canvas.
- Brand meaning: two people intentionally tending one living relationship.
- Audience: modern couples who want an emotionally intelligent relationship app, not a therapy clinic, wedding product, or dating app.
- Style: premium editorial wellness identity; confident, memorable, warm, modern; crisp flat vector-master geometry with slight human-cut irregularity; no photorealism.
- Palette: ONLY warm paper #FAF8F5, coral #E5533A, deep forest #113B36, and saffron #D99A3D.
- Composition: one dominant centered silhouette; 18 percent optical safe margin; two to five foreground groups; strong contrast and readable geometry at 20 px.
- Source requirements: TRUE full-bleed square background with every corner filled; NO pre-rounded app-icon mask, rounded-square border, inset tile, transparency, mockup, device, label, caption, or presentation board.
- Originality: create an original Better Together identity. Do not imitate or reproduce any competitor, trademark, or existing app icon.
- NO gradients, glow, bevel, 3D, shadows, scenery, landscape, literal people, faces, hands, infinity sign, chain link, puzzle pieces, wedding rings, yin-yang, or decorative border.
- Text rule: when the direction requests letters, render ONLY the exact uppercase letters "BT". When the direction does not request letters, render NO text.
globalLockupPrompt:
## Better Together identity variation lockup - Round 4.1
- Use the attached generated variation as the exact visual anchor. Preserve its mark, palette, proportions, and edge character.
- Deliverable: ONE clean square identity presentation on a full-bleed warm-paper #FAF8F5 background.
- Layout: a generous horizontal logo lockup centered in the canvas; icon at left occupies about 27 percent of the width; wordmark at right occupies about 52 percent; large clear margins.
- Required text: render the exact title-case words "Better Together" once and only once. Spell both words perfectly.
- Typography: custom editorial wordmark with confident human warmth, precise spacing, and no generic software-default appearance.
- Colors: deep forest #113B36 wordmark with one restrained coral #E5533A or saffron #D99A3D detail only when specified.
- NO tagline, slogan, extra initials, labels, captions, mockup devices, app-store badge, gradients, shadows, 3D, border, or additional copy.

concepts.name: BT Sprout Cut
concepts.idea: A more organic BT alternative cuts the initials from two broad growing forms and turns their shared junction into a single sprout.
concepts.motionLabel: Cuts open, letters resolve, sprout lifts
concepts.bestFor: A softer, more handcrafted BT app-icon option.
concepts.watchout: The cut geometry still has to read BT before it reads botanical.
concepts.nextStep: Balance the negative-space counters and define the sprout as two animation layers.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - BT Sprout Cut
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Main mark: the exact uppercase letters "BT" occupying the central 62 percent, built from TWO broad organic cut-paper shapes rather than conventional typed letters.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5 at left with one sturdy spine and two unmistakable open counters cut deeply into its right edge.
- T: deep forest #113B36 at right with a broad top cap and a slightly curved growing stem. The T remains fully readable and does not overlap the B.
- Shared detail: the B and T stop with a narrow deliberate gap between them. One compact saffron #D99A3D two-leaf sprout rises from that gap at mid-height.
- MUST read as exact BT first.
- NO ring, circle node, badge, tree, heart, lowercase, script, extra letters, flower, pot, roots, or outline.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: sturdy rounded serif with subtle organic terminals, arranged on two lines with Better above Together.
- Keep the exact icon at left.
- Use deep forest words with coral capital B and T.

concepts.name: Canopy BT
concepts.idea: Instead of growing leaves from one letter, this version lets the B and T hold a shared three-part canopy above them.
concepts.motionLabel: Letters ground, canopy gathers, seed settles
concepts.bestFor: A compact initials-first bonsai with a darker shelf presence.
concepts.watchout: The canopy must stay graphic and separate from the letter counters.
concepts.nextStep: Refine the canopy into three simple masses that remain distinct at 20 px.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Canopy BT
- Background: full-bleed deep forest #113B36.
- Main mark: exact uppercase "BT" centered in the lower-middle of the canvas, occupying 58 percent width and clearly readable.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5, bold, compact, with two large counters.
- T: coral #E5533A, bold, compact, with its vertical stem aligned beside the B and no overlap.
- Canopy: exactly three substantial saffron #D99A3D blunt leaf masses form one low asymmetrical bonsai crown across the top of BOTH letters, with a visible gap above each letter so the canopy is not a hat or accent mark.
- Seed: one small warm-paper circular seed sits in the negative gap between B and T near the baseline.
- NO pot, roots, ground line, ring, badge, heart, text beyond BT, tiny leaf scatter, cloud, broccoli, or enclosing shape.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: compact humanist sans with flared terminals and generous tracking.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set Better Together on one line.
- Use deep forest words with one saffron seed dot after Together.

concepts.name: Heartwood Minimal
concepts.idea: A reduced heart-bonsai keeps only two trunks, one heart-shaped opening, and three leaves for a cleaner small-size mark.
concepts.motionLabel: Trunks rise, heart clears, three leaves open
concepts.bestFor: The clearest small-size bonsai and heart combination.
concepts.watchout: Keep the base open so the paired trunks never become one generic tree trunk.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the heart opening as a single-color cutout and test monochrome silhouettes.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Heartwood Minimal
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: an extremely reduced bonsai-heart symbol occupying the central 58 percent.
- Trunks: one thick coral #E5533A stroke rises from the lower left and one thick deep-forest #113B36 stroke rises from the lower right. They remain separate at the base, curve inward once, and then open outward.
- Heart: the negative space between the inward curves forms one large, perfectly legible upright heart. Do not draw or fill the heart separately.
- Leaves: exactly three large saffron #D99A3D leaf shapes sit above the trunks as a sparse asymmetrical crown, one left, one high center, one right.
- Use only five foreground shapes total: two trunks and three leaves.
- NO letters, pot, ground line, roots, extra leaves, extra heart, circle, canopy cloud, ring, badge, or scenery.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: quiet warm serif with generous counters and restrained contrast.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set Better Together on two lines.
- Use deep forest words and coral only for the capital B.

concepts.name: Offset Heart
concepts.idea: Two offset heart halves hold their individuality while one small diamond marks the intentional space they share.
concepts.motionLabel: Halves align, diamond turns, heart settles
concepts.bestFor: A more graphic and contemporary relationship-first mark.
concepts.watchout: The offset should feel intentional while the full silhouette still reads as a heart instantly.
concepts.nextStep: Tune the diagonal gap and diamond scale at notification-icon size.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - Offset Heart
- Background: full-bleed warm paper #FAF8F5.
- Main mark: one unmistakable upright heart constructed from TWO separate thick organic strokes in the central 60 percent.
- Left stroke: coral #E5533A forms the left lobe and lower-left side, beginning slightly lower than the right stroke and ending before the bottom point.
- Right stroke: deep forest #113B36 forms the right lobe and lower-right side, beginning slightly higher than the left stroke and ending before the bottom point.
- Separation: leave one clean diagonal negative-space channel between the two halves from upper center toward lower center. The halves never touch and contain no horizontal connector.
- Accent: one small solid saffron #D99A3D diamond floats in the diagonal channel just below center. It is a simple four-sided diamond, not a pill, bandage, dash, capsule, or outline.
- The total outer silhouette MUST read as a heart immediately.
- NO bridge, bar, capsule, pill, medical symbol, white outline, letters, pulse line, infinity, chain, arrow, ring, hands, faces, extra hearts, border, or badge.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: modern humanist sans with slightly offset capital baselines.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set Better Together on one line.
- Use deep forest for Better and coral for Together with one saffron diamond after the name.

concepts.name: BT Garden Serif
concepts.idea: A warmer serif BT turns the T crossbar into one controlled leaf terminal, tying the editorial system back to growth.
concepts.motionLabel: Serifs draw, leaf turns, period lands
concepts.bestFor: A warmer editorial identity with more visible garden character.
concepts.watchout: The leaf terminal must stay subtle enough that the T remains unmistakable.
concepts.nextStep: Draw the complete wordmark alphabet and standardize the leaf terminal.
concepts.iconPrompt:
## Direction - BT Garden Serif
- Background: full-bleed coral #E5533A.
- Main mark: exact uppercase "BT" as two separate custom high-contrast serif letters occupying the central 58 percent.
- B: warm paper #FAF8F5, sturdy, with two generous counters and softly tapered bowls.
- T: deep forest #113B36, slightly taller, with a broad horizontal cap and centered tapered stem.
- Growth detail: ONLY the far-right terminal of the T cap becomes one restrained saffron #D99A3D leaf shape. It is part of the T crossbar, not floating decoration.
- Accent: one small warm-paper period sits below and right of the T stem.
- MUST read as exact BT first and editorial growth second.
- NO overlap, bridge, other text, extra leaves, tree, heart, ring, badge, script, swashes, or border.
concepts.lockupPrompt:
- Wordmark treatment: custom warm high-contrast serif derived from the attached BT, with the restrained leaf terminal repeated once on the final r.
- Keep the exact icon at left. Set Better Together on one line.
- Use deep forest words with coral capital B and T and one saffron period.
